# dotclaude

> The app/logic for syncing Claude Code across machines — config-sync + transcript relay.

dotclaude is the app/logic for syncing Claude Code across machines: a git-based config sync plus a pluggable, peer-to-peer transcript relay to your own NAS. Personal content lives in separate private repos so this one is publishable.

## Overview

- [Home](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/index.md)
- [Concepts](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/concepts/index.md)

## Setup & operation

- [Onboarding](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/onboarding/index.md)
- [Day-to-day](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/day-to-day/index.md)
- [Reference](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/reference/index.md)

## Archive & recall

- [Query the archive (MCP)](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/archive-mcp/index.md)
- [Slash commands](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/slash-commands/index.md)

## Transcript relay

- [Transcripts: relay + NAS](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/transports/index.md)
- [Transcript transport](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/transcript-transport/index.md)
- [Memory sync](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/memory-sync/index.md)

- [MCP embedding rerank](https://henba1.github.io/dotclaude/dcmcp-embedding-rerank/index.md)
